message.content:
Read ALL announcement-related RO, VO, and enum classes in D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server\src\main\java\com\yottastudios\ns\collabspace\announcement\

1. Find and read all files in ro/ directory - extract every field with type, validation annotations (@NotNull, @NotBlank, @Min, @Max, @Size, @Schema), and default values
2. Find and read all files in vo/ directory - extract every field with type, @Schema annotations, @JsonFormat
3. Find and read all files in enums/ directory - extract every enum value with code and description
4. Also check the entity/ directory for AnnouncementEntity.java to see all database fields

Output the complete field lists for each class.
